titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 33
GA 33
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: του ανου added to supplied text in 9.16 by David Parker.
Supp which would be unique addition removed in 9.11 by David Parker.
Supp text replaced by lac rest of line and lac rest of verse tags at 10.21 by Rachel Kevern.
[εγειραι] changed to [εγειρε] at 5.8 by Rachel Kevern.
[ιδον] changed to [ειδον] at 19.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Rest of verse illegible tag added at beginning of 12.16 by Rachel Kevern.
Supplied text at beginning of 12.16 changed to [29-31] and supplied text in 12.17 changed to [17] by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 11.25 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 13.10 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
πιστευεις turned into πιστευ εις at 12.44 by Rachel Kevern.
Tagging of lacuna at 11.28 changed by David Parker.
Word break at 9.16 corrected by David Parker.

body.note: Status:G-Α 33Ρaris Βiblio. Νat. Gr.14 John begins Folio 134rΤranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun: 04-04-07Τranscription finished:Τransference to Collate by: WJΕ RΚ ΜΒΜ DCΡ UΒSΤransference to Collate begun:Τransference to Collate finished:File date and time:Ρlaced in Level1:Level1 file date and time:Ρlaced in Level2:Ρlaced in Level2 by:Level2 file date and time:Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Ρlaced in Level3:Ρlaced in Level3 by:Final transcription file date and time:
